meta.title: INTERESTING AMERICA | Sports Accommodation Solutions
meta.description: Finding impossible-to-find accommodation at major US sports events. For sponsors, federations, media, and travel agencies.

data.headline: We Find the Impossible.
data.subheadline: Premium accommodation at major US sports events. For sponsors, federations, media, and agencies.

features.title: Event Expertise
features.text: Since 2010, we've delivered rooms at the world's biggest sports events. FIFA World Cups, Olympics, Formula 1, Champions League.

features.title: Impossible to Find
features.text: When hotels are sold out, we're just getting started. Our network unlocks accommodation others can't access.

features.title: Full Service
features.text: From arrival to departure, we handle logistics, transport, and hospitality—so you focus on the event.

data.headline: Talk is cheap. We are INTERESTING.
data.text:
We find impossible-to-find accommodation at large global sports events. Think Champions League Final, the Football World Cup, Formula 1 and the Olympic Games.

We also transfer your staff and guests. On arrival, on departure and on match day. And—on your behalf—we get access to hospitality: tickets and tables at the finest venues in town.

All this we do for sponsors, sports federations, TV & media, travel agencies and family offices.

data.headline: Planning an event?
data.text: Let's talk about your accommodation needs. We operate across all major US sports markets.
